text: K ytps were funny like 6 years ago but now it's just sad. I'm going through all my old subscriptions to clear it out and I came upon this. Used to love these vids in the day and all, but there's a time when it's too much and too late and time to stop because let's be real.. It's just somewhat funny edits at this point. It used to be original and funny content but now you see it instinctively added into your average YouTube content that isn't even about edits in the first place. Edits like this by them selves used to make me laugh but now we're all so used to it that I might get 1 little giggle out of this (which I did). No hate or anything but I'm just saying it's over and done with and while I know others have different opinions which I totally respect, at least understand that these uploads are so inconsistent and (again, no hate, just criticism) kinda stale. Was a fun ride while it lasted, but unfortunately I'm unsubbing.
